title: PandaClient 16x
description: a Texture pack made for Hypixel Skyblock dungeons.
body:
### The best texture pack for Hypixel Skyblock dungeons
This is still a _**BETA**_ version you can find some of the textures in the **GALLERY** page.

This pack allows you to fell like the _#1_ dungeons player in Hypixel Skyblock (not really) I have made some of the most importat item/block textures for dungeons in this texture pack!!!

Made By _Van1xh_
